diffs.diff:
--- a/debug.py
+++ b/debug.py
@@ -0,0 +1,19 @@
+import sys

+print('Starting debug...', flush=True)

+try:

+    print('Importing torch...', flush=True)

+    import torch

+    print(f'torch OK: {torch.__version__}', flush=True)

+    print('Importing torch_geometric...', flush=True)

+    import torch_geometric

+    print(f'pyg OK: {torch_geometric.__version__}', flush=True)

+    print('Importing model...', flush=True)

+    from model import GNN

+    print('model OK', flush=True)

+    # Test creating model

+    m = GNN(128, 5, 300, 0.5)

+    print(f'Model created, params: {sum(p.numel() for p in m.parameters()):,}', flush=True)

+except Exception as e:

+    print(f'Error: {e}', flush=True)

+    import traceback

+    traceback.print_exc()
